zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：空头主导下的弱势震荡格局
zh.content:
当前价格跌破短期均线，整体仍处于弱势震荡下行结构，反弹动能有限，空头略占优势结构未改，短线偏空运行需关注下方支撑测试情况整体情绪偏谨慎波动

MACD持续位于零轴下方且动能柱走弱，信号线缺失但空头动能仍在释放，短期反弹受限SMA20在现价上方形成压制动能修复仍需时间

下方支撑0.158附近，若跌破可能测试0.156区域；上方阻力0.1605及0.161均线密集区短期区间震荡为主突破需放量确认

建议以反弹高空为主，控制仓位，等待MACD收敛后再考虑趋势性多单，止损紧跟0.161避免追涨杀跌纪律交易为主观望为宜等待信号

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is showing a short-term bearish bias as price continues to hover near the session low around 0.1588. The broader structure remains weak after failing to sustain momentum above the 0.1605–0.1610 region. Price action is compressing under mild downward pressure, suggesting sellers are still controlling intraday direction. However, the decline is gradual rather than impulsive, indicating consolidation within a tight bearish range.

Momentum indicators confirm weakening pressure, with MACD at -0.0006676 staying in negative territory and widening slightly below the signal line absence. This suggests bearish momentum is intact despite low volatility. The lack of RSI reading limits overbought/oversold clarity, but price trading below SMA(20) at 0.160995 reinforces a bearish short-term trend. Overall indicator alignment points toward continued downside risk unless a reclaim of 0.1610 occurs.

Immediate support is located at 0.1588, aligning with current trading lows, and a breakdown could expose the 0.1575 zone followed by 0.1550 as the next structural support. On the upside, resistance is firm at 0.1605, closely aligned with the 20-day SMA, while a stronger barrier sits at 0.1610. A decisive break above 0.1610 would be required to neutralize current bearish pressure.

Short-term trading conditions favor a cautious bearish stance, with rallies toward resistance potentially offering sell-on-strength opportunities. Traders may consider tight risk management, placing stops above 0.1610 to avoid false breakouts. Scalpers could exploit the narrow range between 0.1588 and 0.1605, while swing traders should wait for confirmation of either a breakdown below support or a sustained reclaim of the SMA(20). Patience is key in this low-volatility environment.
